_meta.title: Commodity downstreaming (hilirisasi) value chains — headline trade
_meta.purpose: Sourced headline export totals for the value-chain explorer (/hilirisasi). They replace the previous placeholder summary figures.
_meta.disclaimer: Export totals are from official/industry sources (BKPM, GAPKI, BPS, KKP/UNIDO) for the year noted. Import and surplus figures, and the per-node product values rendered in the tree, are INDICATIVE prototype approximations — verify against primary sources before real use.

sources.Nikel: Kementerian Investasi/BKPM — nickel downstreaming export value 2023 (~US$33.5B), via ANTARA
sources.Sawit: GAPKI — palm oil + derivatives export value 2023 (US$30.32B)
sources.Kelapa: BPS / UN Comtrade — coconut product exports 2023 (~US$1.55B)
sources.Rumput Laut: KKP / UNIDO — seaweed exports 2023 (dried + carrageenan + agar, ~US$0.60B)
